name: Search: WWW
overview: The stories of ambitious career women working at the top of the best portal sites in the IT industry. Paved with wins and losses, their road to success takes a new turn when love comes along the way.

trailers.title: SEARCH: WWW - OFFICIAL TRAILER 2 | Jang Ki Yong, Im Soo Jung, Lee Da Hee, Jeon Hye Jin
